description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cruiser design with a low-slung maroon seat and matching fuel tank, complemented by a matte black frame and metallic accents. The front is equipped with a round yellow headlight, flanked by two rearview mirrors on wide handlebars. The wheels are spoked and robust, with visible disc brakes and a prominent exhaust pipe running along the right side. The rear section includes a compact fender and a cylindrical exhaust muffler, both in maroon and black. The seat is contoured for comfort, accommodating a rider and a passenger, with footrests positioned for relaxed riding. The overall build suggests a sturdy, road-ready vehicle suitable for urban commuting or leisurely rides.
description: A maroon and black cruiser-style motorcycle with a contoured seat, spoked wheels, and a prominent exhaust pipe, designed for comfortable urban riding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round yellow headlight, wide handlebars with mirrors, and the narrow front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the maroon fuel tank, contoured seat, spoked wheels, and the visible exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the maroon rear fender, cylindrical exhaust, and the dual seat layout.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the exhaust pipe and the overall cruiser profile.
